nodes.label: NutriApp Project README
nodes.rationale: Describes a nutrition app for nutritionists covering patients, nutritional plans, scheduling, and a 1669-food database. Uses local SQLite, JWT auth, Node/Express backend, React+Vite frontend. Design decision to keep DB local (never pushed to repo) for patient privacy.

nodes.label: Immutable Plan Update Pattern
nodes.rationale: All plan mutation functions return a new object rather than mutating in place, enabling React state immutability and easy undo. Each function wraps spread-and-map pattern.

links.rationale: The image shows an isometric 3D card/layer shape as its main visual element
The image explicitly shows two stacked flat layers separated with a gap, conveying a layered design metaphor
The bottom layer of the card uses a vivid purple/violet gradient accent color matching a brand palette
The bottom card layer is rendered with the purple accent, indicating the brand color is applied to this UI element
The layered design pattern is expressed through stacked isometric card shapes
